entry.title: Re: Can we develop custom Adobe Forms from Scratch and De...
entry.content:
Hi @RahulJain09 

Usage of custom forms, created via Key User App "Maintain Form Templates", to render print documents via Forms service by Adobe, is currently not supported via Developer Extensibility in S/4 HANA Cloud.

Furthermore there are no options to maintain customer forms via ABAP Development Tools (ADT). Additionally, SAP standard repository for custom forms within Developer Extensibility in S/4 HANA Cloud is not available.

Note that this restriction does not apply when S/4 HANA Output Management is used. Please refer 3355397 - No support for custom form templates in S/4 HANA Cloud Developer Extensibility - SAP for Me for more details.

Please also go through KBA  3356705 - Not able to upload a custom template in Maintain Form Template App - SAP for Me where it is mentioned that currently it is not possible to access SAP standard repository for custom forms within Developer Extensibility. 

Hope this helps !

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Step by Step Guide - Running Automation Script in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Yes, I got it confirmed from this video at 22:00 minutes.

entry.title: Multiple BP Bank account - SEPA Direct Debit.
entry.content:
Hello!!

Our customer is  currently involved in a Conversion BP project as Pre Project of Migration from R3 to S4 Hana. The issue that comes up is, that once the customers and vendors are converted into BPs, there are multiple bank accounts at BP Master Data.

At least, 95% of the customer events come from Sales Orders. These customers pay by SEPA Direct Debit process. In the Sale Order we can not point the bank account to be charged by the Direct Debit and the financial invoices must be updated one by one proper bank acoount. This manual task supposes to update more than 1500 documents fortnightly.

If the bank account in the finance document is in blank, the system chooses the fisrt bank account stored is the BP master data.

Does exist a standard workaround to solve the issue that we have? 

Thank you very much for your feedback.

entry.title: Re: PS Text & Milestone Attachment Issue: Template creation of WBS & Project Definition
entry.content:
Hello @faheem4work,

Two questions:

1. I cannot see that you have created standard milestones or ps texts in your screenshot of your standard project. These would be the prerequisites for copying them when creating a new project based on your standard project.

2. If you have done this, then when creating the project please make sure you activated the checkbox beside the "with Activities" and also the components below it. In your case: "PS Texts, "Milestones" & "Documents". This applies to both, the Project Builder as well as Project Planning Board.

Please confirm you have considered these two points and send a screenshot of the whole standard structure including the milestones and ps texts.

Best regards

Paul

I have replaced license and the new script in install.sh also.. then what is the problem in this.. kindly help me out ASAP.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I‘m Paul from Germany (Berlin) and just startet my SAP career as an SAP Solution Architect for PS/CO. Before that I’ve had 5 years of key user knowledge which showed me the great potential of SAP when utilizing it in a way that end users, customizer and developers find an overall great solution for everyone.

I am excited to meet new equally minded SAP enthusiasts, especially regarding PS/CO.

I would also love to have a Berlin community to get together and discuss about different SAP topics.

Best regards

Paul

entry.title: Re: Deletion of COPA Documents
entry.content:
Greeting

first of all edit your customizing and transfer request 

then reverse documents via KE4S and regenerate them in KE4S again 

data will be fixed

if you want to delete use RKEDELE1  program 

best regards

Ghazal B.afshar

Could you please let me know how to report on picklist Ids in successfactors story reporting #PeopleAnalytics

Surya

entry.title: Quel est l'ID de parrainage le plus élevé de Binance?
entry.content: Votre ID de parrainage le plus élevé de Binance est spécifié comme C15HJGN1. Lorsque vous vous inscrivez sur la bourse Binance à l'aide de ce code, vous devez écrire C15HJGN1 dans le champ « ID de parrainage » ou « Code de parrainage ». Ce code est valable à vie et offre une réduction de commission de 40 % lors de vos transactions sur Binance.

entry.title: Temu 3.000 TL Referans Kodu
entry.content: Temu'ya https://temu.to/m/u9fu1v7mn0z bu bağlantıdan kayıt olun ürün arama kısmına "dpp3976" yazın ve 3.000 TL değerinde kupon kodunu hesabınıza tanımlayın.

entry.title: Binance Code - Referral ID - 40% Discount
entry.content:
Consider using referral ID code "12312367" when creating your Binance account. This code supports a crypto enthusiast who enjoys using the platform and would be happy to help you get started. While I can't guarantee free consultancy forever, using a referral code is a great way to support other users on the platform.

Happy trading!

entry.title: Re: Duplicate ID error while working with Adaptation project
entry.content: "Duplicate id" is not always caused by one specific issue. When it comes to fragments: it depends on how the fragment is created, where it's included, and whether the application follows best practices. Please share the relevant code.

entry.title: how to repeat table in adobe form's masterpage?
entry.content:
Hi guys, I am currently developing a form with Livecycle and as Adobe Livecycle has been discontinued, most of the previous links to repeat table on master page have gone into oblivion.

My form has only 1 master page and on this master page i have placed a table outside of the content area. I would expect this same table to be repeated on every  page depending on the length of the content area but the problem is, there is no data shown from page 2 onwards. Someone mentioned the table data is consumed on the first page itself, so there is nothing left for page 2 onwards. In order to solve this, they suggested to use scripting to duplicate the table for every page. 

I have tried but failed to achieve it as my scripting is not that good. Could anyone here guide me on how to do that?

Thanks

LC

entry.title: Re: Professional Services- Pre-Sales Resource Estimator

entry.title: Re: Issue in Installing SAP ABAP 7.52 in opensuse 15.6
entry.content: Hi, i m new to this, kindly provide any solution to fix this

entry.title: Re: adobe form
entry.content:
Hello JP,

Assuming that your query is related to India's localized invoice form templates, The recommended billing form template in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for India would be "SDBIL_CI_STANDARD_IN" (Customer Invoice Form Standard (India)).

Additionally, there are also IN localized form templates : SDBIL_CI_PROF_SRV_IN (Customer Invoice Form Professional Services (India)) & GST_INV_GLO_IN (GST Invoice Form for India)

Note - GST_INV_GLO_IN is an old template with no/limited extensibility features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. It is recommended to use SDBIL_CI_STANDARD_IN instead.

Moreover, you can also use app 'Maintain Form Templates' to find all pre-delivered form templates, additionally use filter 'Available Countries/regions' and search with your region of choice to list out all pre-delivered/standard form templates localized for that particular country/region.

Please use either of the above standard form template and its datasource in order to create Custom Form Templates.

Please find additional resources that you might find helpful:

SAP Help Portal | Extensibility for Output Forms and Email Templates of Billing Documents

2679030 - Extensibility for Billing Document Printout - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Best Regards,

Rajprit

entry.title: Re: C4C Report data based on user(running user)

entry.title: Re: API/BOI for VL10B
entry.content: Please remove all other tags except 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Supply Chain'

entry.title: Re: Capacity Planning CDS
entry.content:
Hi Lalith,

Could you kindly clarify your question or requirement?

What do you mean the CDS View can take?

Usually CDS Views are used for reporting/analytics or export of data. For example you can expose a CDS View as OData service, but they are read only, not for writing.

Please find the help link for Work Center Capacity CDS View: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/c2bbd25bd6964364883fa0503d18f07a.html?locale=en-US

In that same area of the help, you will find all the CDS Views for the Work Center basic data, as well as the available CDS Views for Production Planning -> Capacity Planning, etc.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Assing Cost Centers - OVF3 - Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Nicolas,

The configuration you have mentioned (similar to OVF3) for assignment of Cost centers to Order reason codes is not available as a front-end configuration activity/SSCUI. It's not designed to be exposed to end users in S/4HANA Cloud.

In order to change this behavior you will be required to submit a feature request, alternatively you may engage with the customer's SAP representative regarding this instance.

Please check KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product. 

Best Regards,

Rajprit

entry.title: Re: Export and Import Feature of SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi @ukinguva - Yes TIH users can import the Skillsplex library, no dependency as such. Though it is advised to review those skills first (as you will get the .csv file from API Hub to load into TIH) with customer and then import the relevant skills only, since in TIH we can't delete skills, but only make them inactive.

Regards

Ujjal

entry.title: Application Server details in the System Information area
entry.content:
Dear Support,

On the right side of the SAPGUI screen, there is a list of SIDs, clients, user names, etc. that can be checked, and depending on the user, the application server name may or may not be in the list.

It was checked the SAP Logonpad options, registry, etc. but could not find the cause. Are there any SAP notes, SAP help, or documentation that has information about this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Application Server details in the System Information...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to SAP Technical Support.

The Application Server information was removed as explained in the SAP Note 2565051 - Application Server Information not displayed in Belize Theme:

In the Belize theme the system information section in SAP GUI for Windows which used to be in the lower right corner has been moved into the upper right corner of the SAP GUI window and three changes have been applied intentionally:

  • The field for the application server name has been removed
  • The field for INS / OVR (Insert / Overwrite) has been removed
  • The icon for the "Local Tab Chain" has been removed

The information about the application server you are connected to can be displayed in the system information section in Belize theme as of the SAP GUI for Windows 7.50 SP004.

On 64bit operating systems when runinng a 32bit version of SAP GUI for Windows:
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Customize\StatusShowModeBelize (REG_DWORD)

On 32bit operating systems and 64bit operating systems when runinng a 64bit version of SAP GUI for Windows:
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Customize\StatusShowModeBelize (REG_DWORD)

To display the application server by default you can change the value to "1".

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")

Here's my submission.

Big thanks to @sudarshan_b, I ran into the very same problem and fixed it by adding an alias. The BTP application log was helpful here, but the error "❗️Uncaught Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'ProductName')" was not really pointing me to search for the error at the SELECT count(*).

entry.title: Re: Issue in Installing SAP ABAP 7.52 in opensuse 15.6
entry.content: You didn't explain what ABAP 7.52 you have installed, what procedure you have followed, what is your operating system and so on. The error message: "CJS-00030 This tool does not support the database server version 15.7.0.000." Lots of SAP notes mention the error code CJS-00030.

entry.title: Re: How to connect PostgreSQL database in crystal report
entry.content:
Firstly be sure to use the latest SP for CR for VS SP 36 from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Create the report first in CR Designer, then simple set the logon info in code.

Here's the info to connect to Postgress DB's:

PostgreSQLPostgreSQL (21)9.6ODBC  PostgreSQL 9.6 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   PostgreSQL 42.1 JDBC End of Support
10ODBC  PostgreSQL 10 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   PostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC End of Support
11ODBC NewPostgreSQL 11 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC  NewPostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC End of Support
12ODBC BI 4.3 SP01+PostgreSQL 12 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP01+PostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC Direct
13ODBC BI 4.3 SP02+PostgreSQL 13 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP02+PostgreSQL 42.2 JDBC Direct
14ODBC BI 4.3 SP03+PostgreSQL 13 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP03+PostgreSQL 42.3 JDBC Direct
15ODBC BI 4.3 SP04+PostgreSQL 13 ODBC  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP04+PostgreSQL 42.3 JDBC Direct
Progress SoftwareProgress OpenEdge11.3ODBC  OpenEdge 11.3B ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   OpenEdge 11.3B JDBC  End of Support
11.6ODBC  OpenEdge 11.6 ODBC  End of Support
JDBC   OpenEdge 11.6 JDBC  End of Support
12ODBC BI 4.3 SP01+DataDirect ODBC Driver for OpenEdge 7.1.6  Direct
JDBC  BI 4.3 SP01+DataDirect JDBC Driver for OpenEdge 5.1.4  Direct

entry.title: Re: Connection info update in crystal reports with oracle...
entry.content:
Check out the test app I wrote and use ReplaceConnection() API to update to the new server:

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Also, upgrade to SP 36, always keep up to date for security updates and DB Client updates.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hi @David_Chaviano ,

I wanted to express my gratitude for this fantastic initiative.

Allow me to introduce myself— I’m a middle aged man based in South Africa and over the years, I’ve gained valuable experience in various administrative roles.
However, I’m keen on upscaling my skills and venturing into the exciting world of SAP to help my chances of securing a job as I am currently unemployed.

I fall in the following categories:

-People in remote or underserved locations that may not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts  
-People looking to switch their careers mid-life


I appreciate your consideration of my application for this initiative. Joining would fulfil my aspirations and allow me to contribute to the SAP domain.

Thank you,

Rasmos

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content: This has helped me understand better and to select a path that works for me. Thank you.

entry.title: I am interested in the training programs
entry.content:
Hello.
My name is Vsevolod, I came from Ukraine and am now in Germany, I received the status of Temporary Asylum.
I am interested in the training programs in your company, and I would like to continue using them, but the cost of training, exams and independent work is very high.
I have two higher educations, one of the highest universities in Ukraine. This is a recognized education of an engineer in electronic devices at the level of highways and management enterprises.

For example, I have about 30 years of experience in electronics and IT. My path began with FIDO, MS-DOS, the first x86 computers and the construction of corporate networks, an IT organization involved in a branch of a small company, setting up VoIP telephony, database servers, etc. I have basic knowledge of many programming languages, development and implementation, including SEO optimization and filling secure sites and sites for the sale of goods and services. I know the syntax of the 1C programming language, which is a competitor to SAP in the post-Soviet space. The business manager education has supplemented my skills and opportunities not only to organize business processes, but also to become a co-owner.
In SAP, I received an initial certificate of a consultant product, deployed a test local version and began to study the syntax of the ABAP language.

I have several questions:
To what extent are IT specialists and economists in demand as two in one in the field of SAP application. Apparently, this is management at the level of a project manager or department, but with extensive experience in SAP. What areas or training programs do I follow to maximize the implementation of two educations in SAP?


Is it worth choosing the IT service management direction in SAP as the fastest and most effective way to enter the labor market?

I would like to apply my skills in projects, demonstrating not only the business process plane, but also the IT infrastructure, hardware with sensors and actuators, API interfaces and data conversion organization.

Thanks in advance.

entry.content:
Hello Experts

We've got som stock stuck at resource while moving to destination bin & this stock is also not visible under the available stock (resource) but under physical stock. There is an option of resource to move the stock using ADPROD in on prem system whereas its not there in public cloud. Could you please help, how to release such stock from resource in public cloud

Thanks

Vivek

In inbound scenario, we are unable to find the option of partial rejection during QI. In manage inspection lot, only follow on function for full receipt works. We have also checked the configuration on EWM side & its looks good but applicability of 'rejection' follow on function is bit confusing. Appreciate, if someone can help on this 

Thanks

Vivek

entry.title: Hiring SAP- Syniti ADM/ADMM Developer (Project)
entry.content:
1) Position: Contractor Role (This is a contractor position for 5-6 months, working 9 hours daily)

2) Job Posting Highlights: We need seasoned SAP-Syniti ADM/ADMM developers for a time-bound project in India. [7 Deloitte office locations]

Key Requirements:

1. Over 3-5 years of experience in SAP Syniti and SAP ADM/ADMM

2. Proven skills in Data Extraction, Data Transformation, Data Construction Page Development, Validation reports, and reconciliation report generation

3. Supported data migration into SAP S4 HANA

4. Familiarity with SAP 4Hana is a bonus

5. Availability to work from 11-8 pm IST

4) Location (or virtual): Remote with frequent office visits 

5) Salary Range: Hourly basis

6) About the candidate: Ideal candidates will have a proven track record with SAP Syniti technology.

😎 Applying instructions: Mail nandini.liddle@strataorg.com 

 

#SAP #Syniti #SAP4HANA #ADM #ADMM

entry.title: Re: Unable to generate customized template in SAP Enable...
entry.content: Greatly valuable content Shane, thank you for sharing!

entry.title: Re: Description field inheritance from a book page template
entry.content:
Hi Emmanuel,

If you create a Book template that has Book Pages, each created from Book Page templates, and you add a description to the Book Page in the Book, these comments will be added to the new Book when it is created from the template.

 In this case, each of the Book Pages in my Book template are created from Book Page templates.  I've added the comment to the Book Page in the Book template, not to the Book Page template and this comment is then added to the corresponding Book Page when a new Book is created using my Book template.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now Certification
entry.content:
Hi,

There is content available from several sites including:

1. The SAP Enable Now Community
2. The Getting Started with Enable Now guide

The best content to study for the Certification is the eLearning courses in SAP Learning Hub, the certification exam summary mentions these eLearning courses, but Learning Hub is not a free resource.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports - How to configure Report Footer to print on same page rather than a separate pa
entry.content:
The report footer will generally print on the last page of the report.

If there is not enough room at the bottom of a page that has other data printed on it, it will print on the next page.

You say that there is plenty of room for the report footer at the end of the page.  This may be from a visual perspective, not from the perspective of the report design.

Some things to check:

  • Check the height of the report footer itself.  I would recommend setting this to either the smaller of a specific size that will contain your disclaimer, or making it as small as possible and setting it to grow if needed.  This should make your report footer section as small as possible.
  • Check your details and page footers that would print before the report footer.  There may be cases where the height of the sections or objects in them are set to a specific height that is taking up space that appears blank from a visual perspective.  Reduce the height of these or set them to be able to grow.

entry.title: Re: how to repeat table in adobe form's masterpage?
entry.content:
Hi,
if you suspect the issue might be due to the merge mode being set to "consumeData" (by default), you could try changing it.
More information is published on the note here: https://me.sap.com/notes/3236812/E

Essentially this is how you can change the mergeMode:

  1. Open the Adobe LiveCycle Designer
  2. View->XML Source
  3. Navigate to the root subform and change the mergeMode:
    <template xmlns:xliff="urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:1.1" xmlns="http://www.xfa.org/schema/xfa-template/3.3/">
    ...
    <subform name="data" layout="tb" locale="de_DE" restoreState="auto" mergeMode="matchTemplate">

entry.title: How to remove the register button from IAS logon screen page for users to authenticate in this page
entry.content: How to remove the register button from IAS logon screen page for users to authenticate in this page

entry.title: error in cl_sxml_string_writer, sXML Library
entry.content:
There is an error in the XML Writer framework. When used, the XML files are created without an XML declaration. Even if the XML declaration is optional, this leads to incorrect behavior. The XML cannot be viewed as a structure in the debugger because the SAP debugger does not recognize the XML as such. The debugger can´t display an XML that creates an SAP class because an optional parameter is missing. It is not a good solution to simply assign the parameter. We made an example to show the effects:

  " make XML with XML declaration
  DATA writer_with_declaration TYPE REF TO if_sxml_writer.
  DATA xml_with_declaration TYPE string.
  writer_with_declaration = CAST if_sxml_writer( cl_sxml_string_writer=>create( encoding = CONV #( 'UTF-8' ) ) ).    " <= XML declaration
  writer_with_declaration->write_node(  writer_with_declaration->new_open_element( name = 'test_tag' ) ) .
  writer_with_declaration->write_node( writer_with_declaration->new_close_element( ) ).
  DATA(conv_w_decl) = cl_abap_conv_in_ce=>create( input = CAST cl_sxml_string_writer( writer_with_declaration )->get_output(  ) encoding = zif_lib_print_serializer=>c_encoding ).
  conv_w_decl->read( IMPORTING data = xml_with_declaration ).

  " make XML without XML declaration
  DATA writer_without_declaration TYPE REF TO if_sxml_writer.
  DATA xml_without_declaration TYPE string.
  writer_without_declaration = CAST if_sxml_writer( cl_sxml_string_writer=>create( ) ).    " <= ** no ** XML declaration
  writer_without_declaration->write_node(  writer_without_declaration->new_open_element( name = 'test_tag' ) ) .
  writer_without_declaration->write_node( writer_without_declaration->new_close_element( ) ).
  DATA(conv_wo_decl) = cl_abap_conv_in_ce=>create( input = CAST cl_sxml_string_writer( writer_without_declaration )->get_output(  ) encoding = zif_lib_print_serializer=>c_encoding ).
  conv_wo_decl->read( IMPORTING data = xml_without_declaration ).

  BREAK-POINT.

entry.title: Can we restore the backup from simplex server to multiplex server
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can we restore the backup in multiplex environment from simplex environment.

If yes, please let us know the process to restore.

 

Thanks,

Abhishek C N

PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can we restore the backup from simplex server to mult...
entry.content:
Target IQ database is restored as an IQ database same to source IQ database.
This means if you restore an IQ database using an IQ full backup collected from a simplex IQ database, then the target IQ database will be restored as a simplex IQ database same to source IQ database.
if you restore an IQ database using an IQ full backup collected from a multiplex IQ database(coordinator node), then the target IQ database will be restored as a multiplex IQ database(coordinator node) same to source IQ database likewise.

So converting an IQ database between simplex and multiplex can be done after restoring an IQ database on target system.
You may convert a multiplex coordinator node to a simplex IQ database or may convert a simplex IQ database to a multiplex coordinator node.

Please refer to following KBAs for more detail information regarding converting IQ database to simplex or multiplex.

--2498692 - How to convert a database to Multiplex , Or install a Multiplex system - SAP IQ 16.x
https://me.sap.com/notes/2498692

--1895892 - How to convert a Multiplex database to a Simplex using command syntax ? - IQ
https://me.sap.com/notes/1895892

entry.title: Bitget-Empfehlungscode "bet365": Bonus für neue Benutzer
entry.content:
Bitget-Empfehlungscodebet365
BonusErhalten Sie bis zu 5000 USDT an Boni, wenn Sie bestimmte Handelsanforderungen erfüllen.
Rabatt auf HandelsgebührenReduziert die Handelskosten um 50 % bei allen Trades, einschließlich Spot und Futures.
Befristetes AngebotGültig ab 29. Juli 2024; es gelten die Allgemeinen Geschäftsbedingungen.

Was ist der Bitget-Empfehlungscode und wie kann ich ihn verwenden? Der Bitget-Empfehlungscode „bet365“ ist ein spezieller Code, den Benutzer bei der Anmeldung bei Bitget eingeben können, um exklusive Vorteile zu erhalten. Ab dem 29. Juli 2024 gewährt die Verwendung dieses Codes 50 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren und einen Bonus von bis zu 5000 USDT. Um ihn zu verwenden, geben Sie den Code während des Registrierungsprozesses auf der Bitget-Plattform ein, entweder auf der Website oder in der mobilen App.Gibt es mit einem Bitget-Empfehlungscode Boni oder Rabatte? Ja, der Bitget-Empfehlungscode „bet365“ bietet erhebliche Boni und Rabatte. Ab dem 29. Juli 2024 erhalten Benutzer, die diesen Code bei der Anmeldung eingeben, 50 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren und können bis zu 5000 USDT als Bonus verdienen. Diese Belohnungen können die Handelskosten erheblich senken und das allgemeine Handelserlebnis verbessern.Wie finde ich einen gültigen Bitget-Empfehlungscode? Sie können einen gültigen Bitget-Empfehlungscode über mehrere Kanäle finden, darunter Werbeaktionen auf der Bitget-Website, Social-Media-Plattformen und Krypto-Foren. Der spezifische Code „bet365“ ist derzeit ab dem 29. Juli 2024 aktiv und bietet 50 % Rabatt auf Gebühren und bis zu 5000 USDT als Bonus.Die Verwendung des Bitget-Empfehlungscodes „bet365“ bietet mehrere Vorteile, darunter: Reduzierte Handelsgebühren: 50 % Rabatt auf alle Handelsgebühren, was für aktive Händler zu erheblichen Einsparungen führen kann. Bonusanreize: Verdienen Sie bis zu 5.000 USDT als Bonus, mit dem Sie Ihr Handelskapital erhöhen können. Verbessertes Handelserlebnis: Zugriff auf exklusive Aktionen und potenzielle VIP-Funktionen, die Ihr gesamtes Handelserlebnis verbessern können.

entry.title: Code de parrainage Bitget: bet365
entry.content:
Code de parrainage Bitgetbet365
Remise sur les frais de négociation 50% on all trades
Bonusrecevez jusqu'à 5 000 USDT
Offre à durée limitéevalable à partir du 29 juillet 2024

Qu'est-ce que le code de parrainage Bitget ? Le code de parrainage Bitget « bet365 » est un code spécial que les utilisateurs peuvent saisir lors de leur inscription à Bitget pour bénéficier d'avantages exclusifs. À partir du 29 juillet 2024, l'utilisation de ce code permet d'obtenir une remise de 50 % sur les frais de négociation et un bonus pouvant atteindre 5 000 USDT. Pour l'utiliser, saisissez le code lors du processus d'inscription sur la plateforme Bitget, soit sur le site Web, soit sur l'application mobile.Existe-t-il des bonus ou des remises disponibles avec un code de parrainage Bitget ? Oui, le code de parrainage Bitget « bet365 » offre des bonus et des remises importants. À partir du 29 juillet 2024, les utilisateurs qui saisissent ce code lors de leur inscription bénéficieront d'une remise de 50 % sur les frais de négociation et pourront gagner jusqu'à 5 000 USDT en bonus. Ces récompenses peuvent réduire considérablement les coûts de négociation et améliorer l'expérience de négociation globale.Quels sont les avantages de l'utilisation d'un code de parrainage Bitget lors de l'inscription ? L'utilisation du code de parrainage Bitget « bet365 » offre plusieurs avantages, notamment : Frais de négociation réduits : une remise de 50 % sur tous les frais de négociation, ce qui peut entraîner des économies importantes pour les traders actifs. Bonus incitatifs : gagnez jusqu'à 5 000 USDT en bonus, qui peuvent être utilisés pour augmenter votre capital de trading. Expérience de trading améliorée : accès à des promotions exclusives et à des fonctionnalités VIP potentielles qui peuvent améliorer votre expérience de trading globale.Comment trouver un code de parrainage Bitget valide ? Vous pouvez trouver un code de parrainage Bitget valide via plusieurs canaux, notamment des promotions sur le site Web de Bitget, les plateformes de médias sociaux et les forums liés à la cryptographie. Le code spécifique « bet365 » est actuellement actif à partir du 29 juillet 2024, offrant une remise de 50 % sur les frais et jusqu'à 5 000 USDT en bonus.

entry.title: Bitget Referans Kodu: bet365
entry.content:
Bitget Referans Kodubet365
İşlem Ücretlerinde İndirimSpot ve vadeli işlemler dahil tüm işlemlerde %50.
Bonus5000 USDT'ye kadar kazanın.
Sınırlı Süreli Teklif29 Temmuz 2024'ten itibaren geçerlidir.

Bitget referans kodu nedir? Bitget referans kodu "bet365", kullanıcıların Bitget'e kaydolurken özel avantajlardan yararlanmak için girebilecekleri özel bir koddur. 29 Temmuz 2024'ten itibaren bu kodun kullanılması, işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirim ve 5000 USDT'ye kadar bonus sağlar. Kullanmak için, Bitget platformunda kayıt işlemi sırasında web sitesinde veya mobil uygulamada kodu girin.Bitget referans koduyla herhangi bir bonus veya indirim mevcut mu? Evet, "bet365" Bitget referans kodu önemli bonuslar ve indirimler sunuyor. 29 Temmuz 2024'ten itibaren, kayıt sırasında bu kodu giren kullanıcılar işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirim alacak ve bonus olarak 5000 USDT'ye kadar kazanabilirler. Bu ödüller işlem maliyetlerini büyük ölçüde azaltabilir ve genel işlem deneyimini iyileştirebilir.Geçerli bir Bitget referans kodunu nasıl bulabilirim? Bitget web sitesindeki promosyonlar, sosyal medya platformları ve kripto ile ilgili forumlar dahil olmak üzere çeşitli kanallardan geçerli bir Bitget yönlendirme kodu bulabilirsiniz. Belirli "bet365" kodu şu anda 29 Temmuz 2024'ten itibaren aktif olup ücretlerde %50 indirim ve bonus olarak 5000 USDT'ye kadar kazanç sağlıyor.Bitget referans kodu "bet365"i kullanmak, aşağıdakiler dahil olmak üzere çeşitli faydalar sağlar: Azaltılmış işlem ücretleri: Aktif yatırımcılar için önemli tasarruflara yol açabilen tüm işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirim. Bonus teşvikleri: Yatırım sermayenizi artırmak için kullanabileceğiniz 5000 USDT'ye kadar bonus kazanın. Geliştirilmiş yatırım deneyimi: Genel yatırım deneyiminizi artırabilecek özel promosyonlara ve potansiyel VIP özelliklerine erişim.

entry.title: Re: CCLM Querying data by BW content like 0SM_CCLM
entry.content: Hello Patrick, Regarding decommissioning cockpit projects, for support types of objects if they are used during project defined period, they should not be listed in object list and should not be flagged as Recommended for Decommissioning. If that happens, please raise a case to SAP for further analysis. Regarding no longer used structures, data elements and domains, I am afraid last usage information of those objects will not be collected because they are not among the supported object types of CCLM function. To query all objects including both used & unused, table AGSCCL_OBJECT can be used.

entry.title: Código de convite Bitget: bet365
entry.content:
Código de convite Bitgetbet365
Desconto em Taxas de Negociação50% em todas as transações, incluindo spot e futuros.
BónusReceba até $5.000 USDT.
Oferta por tempo limitadoválida a partir de 29 de julho de 2024.

Qual é o código de convite do Bitget? O código de convite do Bitget “bet365” é um código especial que os utilizadores podem introduzir ao subscrever o Bitget para receber benefícios exclusivos. A partir de 29 de julho de 2024, a utilização deste código concede um desconto de 50% nas taxas de negociação e um bónus de até 5.000 dólares USDT. Para o utilizar, insira o código durante o processo de registo na plataforma Bitget, seja no site ou na aplicação móvel.

 

 

 

 

 

Existe algum bónus ou desconto disponível com um código de convite Bitget? Sim, o código de convite Bitget “bet365” oferece bónus e descontos significativos. A partir de 29 de julho de 2024, os utilizadores que introduzirem este código durante a inscrição receberão um desconto de 50% nas taxas de negociação e poderão ganhar até 5.000 dólares americanos como bónus. Estas recompensas podem reduzir significativamente os custos de negociação e melhorar a experiência geral de negociação.

 

 

 

 

 

Quais são os benefícios de utilizar um código de indicação Bitget ao registar-se? A utilização do código de convite Bitget “bet365” oferece vários benefícios, incluindo: Taxas de negociação reduzidas: Um desconto de 50% em todas as taxas de negociação, o que pode levar a poupanças significativas para os traders ativos. Incentivos de bónus: Receba até 5.000 dólares USDT como bónus, que pode ser utilizado para aumentar o seu capital comercial. Experiência de negociação melhorada: Acesso a promoções exclusivas e possíveis funcionalidades VIP que podem melhorar a sua experiência de negociação global.

entry.title: Fiori Elements Overview Page does not work in latest SAPUI5 version 1.126.1
entry.content:
Hi all,

Now I am testing Fiori Elements Overview Page (OVP) with CAP OData service V4.

I found OVP does not start display with latest SAPUI5 version 1.126.1, instead OVP works with previous version like 1.124.2. 

Could you tell me whether this issue is reproduced by your environment too?

My repository: kaztakata/sap-sample-fiori-elements-overview-page (github.com)

app/project2: working with 1.124.2

app/project3: not working with 1.126.1

entry.title: Re: BOM component valid date
entry.content:
There is no method to open the valid data change if not use ECN. If you want to change the components after the created data (the first time you create the BOM, the system will set all the components as a default valid date), you can use ECN to change the component.

If you you want to change the components before the created data, you cannot change the BOM, since the BOM doesn't exist, you should create the BOM with the data.

entry.title: Re: Finding the G/L Account Not Used field
entry.content:
Hello Anthony,

I have found the field being used in the CDS views I_GLAccountInChartOfAccounts and I_GLAccountInCompanyCode, but I can't seem to reference it in my custom CDS view. It says I do not have permission to do so. Do you happen to know any other CDS views with the same flag G/L Account not Used?

Thanks,

Lam

entry.title: Codice referral Bitget: bet365
entry.content:
Codice referral Bitget"bet365"
Sconto sulle commissioni di negoziazione50% su tutte le operazioni, comprese spot e futures.
Bonusricevi fino a $ 5000 USDT.
Offerta a tempo limitatovalida dal 29 luglio 2024.

Cos'è il codice referral Bitget? Il codice di riferimento Bitget "bet365" è un codice speciale che gli utenti possono inserire quando si iscrivono a Bitget per ricevere vantaggi esclusivi. A partire dal 29 luglio 2024, l'utilizzo di questo codice garantisce uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni di trading e un bonus fino a $ 5000 USDT. Per utilizzarlo, inserisci il codice durante il processo di registrazione sulla piattaforma Bitget, sul sito Web o sull'app mobile.

 

 

 

 

 

Ci sono bonus o sconti disponibili con un codice referral Bitget? Sì, il codice referral Bitget "bet365" offre bonus e sconti significativi. Dal 29 luglio 2024, gli utenti che inseriscono questo codice durante la registrazione riceveranno uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni di trading e potranno guadagnare fino a $ 5000 USDT come bonus. Questi premi possono ridurre notevolmente i costi di trading e migliorare l'esperienza di trading complessiva.

 

 

 

 

 

Come trovo un codice referral Bitget valido? Puoi trovare un codice di riferimento Bitget valido tramite diversi canali, tra cui promozioni sul sito Web di Bitget, piattaforme di social media e forum correlati alle criptovalute. Il codice specifico "bet365" è attualmente attivo dal 29 luglio 2024, offrendo uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni e fino a $ 5000 USDT come bonus.

 

 

 

 

 

Quali sono i vantaggi di utilizzare un codice referral Bitget al momento della registrazione? L'utilizzo del codice di riferimento Bitget "bet365" offre diversi vantaggi, tra cui: Commissioni di trading ridotte: uno sconto del 50% su tutte le commissioni di trading, che può portare a risparmi significativi per i trader attivi. Incentivi bonus: guadagna fino a $ 5000 USDT come bonus, che può essere utilizzato per aumentare il tuo capitale di trading. Esperienza di trading migliorata: accesso a promozioni esclusive e potenziali funzionalità VIP che possono migliorare la tua esperienza di trading complessiva.

@HASEEFAAMIR1234@GMAIL.COM

entry.title: Re: Search not showing Invoice document
entry.content: Hi Artuto, Here is the fix from SAP. by the upgrade to SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402, the ESH-cache containing the search relevant data for all the search connectors was not updated. So the cache contained old data. This was the cause of the search error. I deleted the old cache using transaction DBACOCKPIT --> Diagnostics --> SQL Editor executing the statement: ALTER SYSTEM CLEAR CACHE ('ESHMetadataCache'); Then I activated all the search connectors which were in status "Error While Preparing" ( using transaction ESH_DASHBOARD ). The activation writes the actual data in the ESH cache. The development will offer for the next SP a function in ESH_DASHBOARD for the updating of the ESH-cache ( to avoid the manuell updating ).

entry.title: Re: CK11N Issue (Standard Cost Estimate)
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the field Variance key in the view costing 1 , to maintain the proper value for the materials. default in cloud is 000001.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购话题
entry.content:
本篇博客展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中寻源和采购版块发布的新功能以及重大变化须知，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 寻源和合同管理
  • 运营采购
  • 发票管理

寻源和合同管理

批量更改采购信息记录

  1. 现在可以使用“版本”字段批量更新类别为“转包的”采购信息记录的生产版本。

管理采购合同

  1. 现在可以实现采购合同的版本管理。更改并发布已批准或已拒绝采购合同的版本相关字段时，将自动创建新版本。

配置信息 

SSCUI103497 用来配置更改原因（例如，法律更改或文档问题）

SSCUI 103498 用来配置是否激活版本管理，以及哪些字段在更改后会导致创建新版本。

 

测试结果：

当更改合同到期日从2024-07-23到2024-07-24点保存，看到两个报错，因为我们在103498配置了‘新版本原因’和‘采购员注释’两个字段为必输。

输入进去后就可以保存合同，并且看到合同创建了新的版本信息。

运营采购

应用：我的采购申请（新）

  1. “在我的采购申请 - 新”应用中，您可以在采购申请项目的“状态详细信息”查看预制发票作为采购申请项目的后续凭证。

注意：此应用是 “创建采购申请” 和 “我的采购申请” 应用的后继。“创建采购申请和”“我的采购申请”应用自 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2308 起弃用。缺省情况下，已弃用的应用在 SAP Fiori 快速启动板上可能不再可用。在这种情况下，您可以在应用查找器中找到该应用，直到将其删除为止。我们建议您尽快切换到“我的采购申请 - 新建”后继应用。

  1. 采购申请中的订单确认和提前装运通知

作为员工，“在我的采购申请 - 新”应用中，您现在可以在采购申请项目的“状态详细信息”中查看“订单确认”和“提前装运通知”。

应用：处理采购申请 (V2)

现在可以根据“处理采购申请 (V2) 应用中的以下新字段过滤和查看采购申请项目：

固定供应商名称

期望供应商名称

地区

采购申请（高级）

在此应用中通过采购申请项目创建具有自定义凭证类型的采购订单。

SSCUI 102909 定义采购申请的凭证类型中配置了采购订单类型ZNB

选中这条点击‘链接采购申请 - 凭证类型’维护了ZNJ的采购申请的类型。

当对ZNJ类型的采购申请创建采购订单时：

可以看到默认出来的采购订单类型是ZNB

同时，也可以通过采购订单凭证类型的映射基于业务加载项“确定：采购订单的凭证类型” (ME_BSART_DETERMINE) 来更灵活地决定采购订单类型。

应用：转包凭证清理

可以更正相关转包采购凭证（采购订单、计划协议、采购申请或预留）的不一致（如果有）这些不一致可能由程序错误引起。

发票管理

应用：管理供应商发票

单击“显示更改日志”按钮时，将显示抬头和项目级别供应商发票的所有已更改凭证信息的日志。

应用：上载供应商发票

使用两个新状态“发票草稿已删除”和“发票已删除”，便可以跟踪发票草稿或发票是否已删除。此外，已启用“导出”功能，现在您可以将已上载的供应商发票清单直接导出到 Microsoft Excel 或在导出前调整格式等设置。

应用：计划供应商发票作业 - 高级

通过“计划供应商发票作业 - 高级”应用中的此功能，您现在可以在通过电子邮件向供应商发送“评估收据结算” (ERS) 开发票凭证时使用新的电子邮件模板 MM_IV_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_ERS。

新业务加载项 (BAdI) MRM_ERS_CLOUD_FDP_ITEM 可用。

缺省情况下，新的 ERS 电子邮件模板在“输出参数确定”应用中供应商发票的确定步骤“电子邮件设置中”设置为电子邮件模板。

更多关于 SAP S/4HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition:

  • 后勤常见热点问题汇总FAQ查看
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2402 采购话题亮点前瞻 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2308 采购话题亮点前瞻 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2302 采购话题亮点前瞻 查看

关注 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 标签， PSCC_Enablement 标签，和PSCC_CCC_CN 标签来第一时间了解我们的最新博客。

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item Check - How to do it right.
entry.content:
Thank you Gerald and Stefan for the information.

For  RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA, we notice there is Custom Code Analysis.

Do we need to run that check if customer have their own ABAP, Fiori Apps program and etc?

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request fai...
entry.content: Still got 401 error, and didn't find the solution yet

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产计划）
entry.content:
在SAP 公有云2408版本发布之际，想借本篇博客和大家一起来看下制造的生产计划部分有哪些更新和变化。

总的来说，在生产计划领域，本次版本的变化主要在于系统使用控制的精细化和操作的方便性上面，包括以下几个核心变化点：

  1. 为了使用户在系统中操作数据更加清晰地锁定在自己管辖范围，在App缓冲定位 和 产品批量维护（DD）中，我们均增加了职责范围的设定，您现在可以从“应用设置”菜单中选择基于 MRP 控制者的职责范围，这样在您下次访问时系统会默认将数据限制在已设定的职责范围内。

  1. 在App 计划产品分类（DD）中，增加了一个勾选项：“排除备选物料清单”，选中该复选框时，如果一个组件在不同的备选BOM中都存在，物料清单用途值将不会增加。清除此复选框可在计划产品分类的作业中将备选物料清单包含在计算范围之内。

  1. 可使用归档对象“PP_TDPSTK”将生产计划的时间相关库存进行归档。该归档对象包含时间相关库存表中的数据，比如如下字段：

字段

简短描述

MANDT

客户端

MATNR

物料编号

WERKS

工厂

BERID

MRP范围

DATE_FROM

有效期起始日期

DATE_TO

有效期截止日期

SAFETY_STOCK

安全库存

REORDER_POINT

重订货点

TARGET_STOCK

目标库存水平

MAX_STOCK

最大库存水平

STOCK_UNIT

基本计量单位

SAFETY_DOS

安全供应天数（工作日）

TARGET_DOS

目标供应天数（工作日）

MAX_DOS

最大供应天数（工作日）

CHANGE_MODE

更改模式

PROP_DATE_FROM

建议有效期起始日期

PROP_VER

建议版本

PROPOSAL_ID

建议标识

CREATED_BY

创建对象的负责人姓名

CHANGED_BY

更改对象的人员姓名

CREATED_TIME

简短格式的 UTC 时戳 (YYYYMMDDhhmmss)

CHANGED_TIME

简短格式的 UTC 时戳 (YYYYMMDDhhmmss)

基于不同公司的时间相关库存数量差异可能比较大，在执行归档之前，建议先以测试运行模式归档一定数量的时间相关库存，便于估计所有数据归档的实际执行时间。

  1. 在产能计划板App的管理工序页面可以通过拖拽的方式对订单工序进行跨生产版本的重新计划了
  2. 当您对物料运行MRP计划后，系统对于MRP元素有些建议操作，以确保按计划覆盖需求。这些建议是以附加列的形式在“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净细分”和“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净值和单个细分”应用中显示，其中包括重新计划建议的数量。在以往的版本中，该列信息是需要在激活新功能的配置应用中激活后才能显示，从2408版本开始，无需激活即可使用该功能了。

  1. 在管理计划订单应用中，我们添加了转换按钮，这样您就可以方便快捷地在这里将多个计划订单批量转换成生产订单/流程订单，或者采购申请了。

 

更多关于 SAP S/4HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition: 

  • 引导解决决策树关键字及对应链接汇总 查看

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2402 亮点前瞻 查看  
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 2308 亮点前瞻 查看  

Feel free to ask your questions on SAP Community here. 关注 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 标签， PSCC_Enablement 标签，和PSCC_CCC_CN 标签来第一时间了解我们的最新博客。

entry.title: Bitget-viitekoodi: bet365 - Voimassa 29.7.2024 alkaen
entry.content:
Bitget-viitekoodi"bet365"
Alennus kaupankäyntipalkkioista50 % kaikista kaupoista, mukaan lukien spot- ja futuurit.
BonusSaat jopa $ 5000 USDT.
Rajoitetun ajan tarjousVoimassa 29.7.2024 alkaen.

Mikä on Bitget-viitekoodi? Bitget-viittauskoodi "bet365" on erityinen koodi, jonka käyttäjät voivat syöttää rekisteröityessään Bitgetiin saadakseen eksklusiivisia etuja. 29. heinäkuuta 2024 alkaen tämän koodin käyttö antaa 50 %:n alennuksen kaupankäyntikuluista ja bonuksen jopa $5000 USDT. Käyttääksesi sitä, syötä koodi rekisteröintiprosessin aikana Bitget-alustalla joko verkkosivustolla tai mobiilisovelluksessa.

 

 

 

 

 

Onko Bitget-viittauskoodilla saatavilla bonuksia tai alennuksia? Kyllä, Bitget-viitekoodi "bet365" tarjoaa merkittäviä bonuksia ja alennuksia. 29. heinäkuuta 2024 alkaen käyttäjät, jotka syöttävät tämän koodin rekisteröitymisen yhteydessä, saavat 50 %:n alennuksen kaupankäyntimaksuista ja voivat ansaita jopa $5000 USDT bonuksena. Nämä palkinnot voivat vähentää huomattavasti kaupankäyntikustannuksia ja parantaa yleistä kaupankäyntikokemusta.

 

 

 

 

 

Kuinka löydän kelvollisen Bitget-viittauskoodin? Löydät kelvollisen Bitget-viittauskoodin useiden kanavien kautta, mukaan lukien tarjoukset Bitget-verkkosivustolta, sosiaalisen median alustat ja krypto-foorumit. Tarkka koodi "bet365" on tällä hetkellä aktiivinen 29. heinäkuuta 2024 alkaen tarjoten 50 % alennuksen maksuista ja jopa $5000 USDT bonuksena.
